nasb.text: On the sixth day, when they prepare what they bring in, it will be twice as much as they gather daily.”

esv.text: On the sixth day, when they prepare what they bring in, it will be twice as much as they gather daily.”

cnv.text: 到第六天，他們把收進來的預備好，比每天收取的多一倍。”

ccb.text: 到第六天，他们要比平时多拾取一倍，好够两天的分量。”
